zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Fairfax於1613年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可盧包時，她的父親Benjamin Fairfax21歲，母親Sarah Galliard22歲。她和Rev. Bartholomew Allerton至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1678年9月13日在英國英格蘭素福爾可海萊斯沃斯享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可海萊斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Fairfax于1613年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可盧包时，她的父亲Benjamin Fairfax21岁，母亲Sarah Galliard22岁。她和Rev. Bartholomew Allerton至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1678年9月13日在英国英格兰素福爾可海萊斯沃斯享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可海萊斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Fairfax was born in 1613, in Rumburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Benjamin Fairfax, was 21 and her mother, Sarah Galliard, was 22. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Rev. Bartholomew Allerton. She died on 13 September 1678, in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Fairfax est née en 1613, à Rumburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Benjamin Fairfax, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Sarah Galliard, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Rev. Bartholomew Allerton. Elle est décédée le 13 septembre 1678, à Halesworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Halesworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Fairfax 1613 in Rumburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Benjamin Fairfax 21 und ihre Mutter Sarah Galliard 22. Sie hatte mit Rev. Bartholomew Allerton mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. September 1678 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Fairfax è nata il nel 1613 nel Rumburgh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Benjamin Fairfax, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Sarah Galliard, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Rev. Bartholomew Allerton. Morì il 13 settembre 1678, nel Halesworth, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Halesworth, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Fairfaxが1613年にイギリスイギリススフォルクルンブルグで生まれた時，父Benjamin Fairfaxは21歳，母Sarah Galliardは22歳であった。彼女はRev. Bartholomew Allertonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1678年9月13日にイギリスイギリススフォルクヘイレスウオルスで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクヘイレスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Fairfax(이)가 1613년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 럼버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Benjamin Fairfax(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Galliard(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Rev. Bartholomew Allerton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1678년 9월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤일스워스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤일스워스에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Rev. Bartholomew Allerton. Ela faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1678, em Halesworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Halesworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Fairfax родилась в 1613 г. в местности румбург, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Benjamin Fairfax было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Sarah Galliard, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Rev. Bartholomew Allerton. Она умерла 13 сентября 1678 г. в местности хэлесворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности хэлесворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
